title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial on setting up and using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. Covers installation on Windows, LLM selection like Qwen 3.5, and demonstrates building a multi-agent travel app with Python and Flask UI.
